hero.description: Software Developer with experience in fintech product, REST API development, microservices, external service integrations, and production systems. I work mainly on backend, focusing on maintainable, robust, product-oriented solutions.
hero.cta_journal_aria: Open Tobias Moreno's journal in a new tab

about.title: About
about.paragraph_1: I'm a Software Developer based in Córdoba, Argentina, working on fintech product. I design and maintain REST APIs, microservices, and external service integrations for flows used by brokers, real estate agencies, and internal teams.
about.paragraph_2: I focus on building maintainable and predictable software for production: business validations, resilience around external providers, traceability, debugging, testing, and development-flow automation. I use AI and Spec-Driven Development to reduce ambiguity, anticipate edge cases, generate tests, and document technical decisions.

mindset.title: How I Think
mindset.subtitle: Engineering principles I apply in day-to-day work.
mindset.card1_desc: Before writing code, I clarify requirements, contracts, edge cases, and expected behavior.
mindset.card2_desc: Working locally is not enough. I think about traceability, provider errors, timeouts, retries, and debugging.
mindset.card3_desc: I prefer clear solutions with separated responsibilities that are easier for the team to extend.
mindset.card4_desc: I use pipelines, tests, linting, tag-based deploys, and documentation to reduce friction and repeatable errors.
mindset.card5_desc: I use agents and SDD to accelerate analysis, validation, and documentation while keeping ownership of technical decisions.

projects.title: Relevant Projects
